text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
This is really putting a lot of strain on my legs...
However, my strides feel solid and powerful.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I have to perfect this running style!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: One more lap!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me. I don't mean to overstep, but is
Satono all right?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if she's relying too much on brute
force or overstraining herself, but she doesn't
seem to be running with her usual finesse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've been training to strengthen her running in
preparation for her race against Mejiro McQueen
in the autumn Tenno Sho and future international
races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, a truly unexpected development has
arisen—Satono Diamond's running has become
increasingly unstable.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's almost as if she's struggling to control her
strength properly.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It may only be because she's running on sand. I
hope it's just a temporary issue.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hope the same, but it's impossible to tell. For
now, I'll continue to keep an eye on how things
unfold.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before long, the final day of summer camp is
upon us.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Let's sit next to each other on the bus, Kita! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Way ahead of you! I've already put my bags on
our seats to save them! Come on!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ummm, Dia?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: She's already asleep...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Zzz... I have to get... stronger...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You worked so hard during summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Good night, Dia.
